steps.title: Start with the volume range
steps.content:
Let $V$ be the volume. The estimate says the volume is greater than $10.4$ cubic feet and less than $13.4$ cubic feet:
$$10.4

steps.title: Convert volume to weight
steps.content:
The block weighs $160$ pounds per cubic foot, so multiply every part of the volume inequality by $160$:
$$160(10.4)<160V<160(13.4)$$Since $x=160V$, the weight inequality is:
$$160(10.4)C.
